_doc: Daily-address greetings + microcopy templates. Igbo terms use proper Unicode diacritics per design/shell/05-lore-and-nomenclature.md §5 and open-question 3.

firstRun.title: Welcome to your Obi.
firstRun.gloss: This is your seat of strength. Your right hand has work to do.

emptyTasks.label: Your right hand rests. What will you build?

failedRetry.label: Even the ram pauses. Try again.

shapeOfDay.noSessions: No sessions open. A clean slate.
shapeOfDay.momentumHigh: There's momentum to pick back up.
shapeOfDay.momentumLow: Pick it back up when you're ready.
